prompt_text: A tense full shot of two ancient Chinese nobles in a confined interior chamber: Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, cinematic lighting, stands in the left midground in a slightly brighter patch, her robe hem subtly disordered, dust marks visible on her sleeve cuff and beside one knee; Shen Ci, a tall aristocratic young man from ancient China, cold and elegant, sharp long eyes, pale skin, high nose bridge, thin lips, black hair in a neat topknot with jade crown, wearing dark blue and black embroidered hanfu, restrained noble aura, subtle obsession and sorrow in his expression, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, stands in the darker right background with half of his body swallowed by shadow. They face each other across an empty strip of floor charged with confrontation, neither moving, the mood restrained and cold. A dark doorframe presses in from one side as foreground framing, while a wooden table and a flickering candle occupy the right foreground, the table cutting horizontally across the space. Old wood walls, gray-blue shadows, dark teal and brown tones, amber candlelight trembling softly against desaturated cool darkness, oppressive ritual domestic atmosphere. Cinematic historical drama realism, limited subjective perspective, precise composition, shallow film grain, highly detailed texture, restrained color palette, Song dynasty inspired aristocratic interior
